examples.text: وَكَانَت رُوسِيَا تُرَاقَبٌ مِنْ بَعِيد مُسْتَخْدِمَةً سَطْوَتَهَا السِّيَاسِيَّةَ فِي مَجْلِسِ الْأَمْنِ لِصَالِحِ بَشَار.
examples.english: And Russia was watching from afar using its political power in the Security Council for (the sake of) Bashar.

etymology.text: Morphologically from the root س ط و (s ṭ w).
